result: {"verdict": "approve", "reasons": ["Verified on a live D7 site: anonymous request to /api/healthstats returns HTTP 403; authenticated request returns HTTP 200 with Content-Type: application/json and body exactly {\"users\":1,\"nodes\":13}", "hook_permission defines 'view healthstats'; hook_menu wires it via access arguments", "drupal_json_output() is D7's native JSON delivery (sets header, no exit); NULL page-callback return is explicitly handled by drupal_deliver_html_page so no HTML wrapper or text/html override occurs", "Counts use status = 1 on {users} and {node}; uid 0 excluded since anonymous has status 0", "php -l passes; 2-space indentation and doc comments on all hooks"]}
